title: Continue the Subject Over Its Own Stretto Entry
objective: The leader states the subject head in V0; at beat 3 the follower enters in V1 with the subject an octave below. Compose the leader's continuation (beats 4-8) over the incoming subject, closing on the final octave.
prompt: Fill V0 beats 4-8 with a continuation line against the locked follower. Do not alter the given subject notes in either voice. Integer-beat intervals must be consonant; move contrary or oblique against the follower and do not shadow it in parallel perfect intervals. End beat 8 on D4 over the follower's final D3. Note: this subject admits an octave stretto at a 3-beat delay; a 2-beat delay at the fifth fails on beat 3.
success_criteria: Every row remains strict parser-valid MidGrid.
The subject head in V0 (beats 0-3) and the follower in V1 are unchanged.
V0 is filled from beat 4 through a final note at beat 8.
Corrected solution has no evaluator errors.
